title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
